nodes.name: 果鳩屬
nodes.summary: 果鳩屬（Ptilinopus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联52种鸟类，如Scarlet-breasted fruit dove、Wompoo fruit dove、Yellow-breasted fruit dove等52种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-eared fruit dove
nodes.summary: Red-eared fruit dove（Ptilinopus fischeri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-eared fruit dove。

nodes.name: Red-eared fruit dove
nodes.summary: The red-eared fruit dove (Ramphiculus fischeri) is a species of bird in the pigeon family. It is endemic to the island of Sulawesi, Indonesia. This species was formerly placed in the genus Ptilinopus. Distribution Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. They are found at elevations between 1,000–3,000 m (3,300–9,800 ft). Subspecies Three subspecies are recognised: R. f. fischeri (Brüggemann, F, 1876) – montane forest of northern Sulawesi R. f. centralis (Meyer, AB, 1903) – montane forest of central and southeastern Sulawesi R. f. meridionalis (Meyer, AB & Wiglesworth, LW, 1893) – southwestern Sulawesi (Lompobattang Massif) Status It is listed as least concern by the IUCN although their populations are currently decreasing. See also Lompobattang fruit-dove - a similar species Fauna of Indonesia List of least concern birds References
